_meta.description: Catalogo de RPC IDs de Google Finance descubiertos via reverse engineering del HTML. Cada RPC se invoca via POST /finance/beta/_/FinHubUi/data/batchexecute?rpcids={RPC_ID}.
_meta.warning: Estos RPC IDs son INTERNOS de Google y pueden cambiar sin aviso. Si una llamada empieza a fallar con 400/500, re-derivar el mapping desde el HTML (ver references/LIMITATIONS_TROUBLESHOOTING.md).

hgueg.description: Indices globales: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq Composite, Russell 2000, VIX, DAX, FTSE 100, Nikkei 225, Hang Seng, IBEX 35, CAC 40, etc
hgueg.args_explanation: [1] = market region preset. Otros valores no testeados.
hgueg.output_shape: Array de regiones, cada una con array de indices: [['/m/0cqyw', ['.DJI', 'INDEXDJX'], 'Dow Jones Industrial Average', ...quote_array..., ...]]

vNewwe.description: Sectors equity heatmap (Health Care, Energy, Tech, etc) con performance %
vNewwe.output_shape: Array de sectors, cada uno con id, name, change_pct, top performers/laggards

gCvqoe.description: Quote basico: precio, change, prev_close, currency, market hours, timezone, color del logo
gCvqoe.args_explanation: [[[null, [TICKER, EXCHANGE]]], 1] — el 1 final es algun flag de version. Acepta multiples simbolos en el array interior.
gCvqoe.output_shape: [[[/m/ID, [TKR, EX], 'Company Name', 0, 'USD', [price, change, change_pct, ...], null, prev_close, color_hex, country_code, ...]]]

JL8oKc.description: Descripcion empresa + datos profundos: address, employees, market cap, open/high/low, volume, 52w range, P/E, EPS, dividend yield, website URL, wikipedia URL
JL8oKc.output_shape: [[[/m/ID, 'Company Name', 'Description text...', [city, region, country, country_code, address], [founded_year], null, employees, market_cap, prev_close, open, high, low, ...]]]

SICF5d.description: Peers / related stocks. El segundo arg controla cuantos peers retornar.
SICF5d.args_explanation: [[null, [TKR, EX]], N] — N es cantidad de peers (probado: 4, mayor valor retorna mas).

YTM9q.description: Analyst recommendations: summary agregado (Buy/Hold/Sell counts + avg price target) + lista detallada por analista con firma, rating, fecha, target
YTM9q.output_shape: [['Company', 'USD', avg_target, target_high, target_low, ..., 'Buy', buy_count, hold_count, sell_count, ...], [[analyst_id, 'Name', 'Firm', 'Hold', 'date', 'url', 'logo', target, prev_target, ...], ...]]

XxQsbd.description: Earnings history multi-periodo (años + trimestres) con valores reportados + EPS
XxQsbd.output_shape: Array de earnings rows: [['/m/ID', [TKR, EX], 'Company', YEAR, QUARTER, ..., [null, null, ..., EPS, revenue, ...], 'CCY', [period_end_date]], ...]

dlNq8b.description: Quote full enriquecido con industry y mini-cards de simbolos relacionados
dlNq8b.output_shape: Similar a gCvqoe pero con campos extra: industry, market_cap_decimal, volume, peer cards

c2u4wc:1min.description: OHLC INTRADAY 1-min del dia actual de mercado
c2u4wc:1min.output_shape: Array de bars: [[[YYYY,MM,DD,HH,MM,...], [close, change, change_pct, ...], volume], ...]

c2u4wc:5min.description: OHLC INTRADAY 5-min con formato OHLC explicito + timestamp ISO
c2u4wc:5min.output_shape: Array de bars: [[open, close, high, low, ISO_timestamp, volume], ...]

c2u4wc:daily.description: OHLC DIARIO ultimo mes (~22 dias habiles)
c2u4wc:daily.output_shape: Array de bars: [[[YYYY,MM,DD,...], [close, change, change_pct, ...], volume], ...]

c2u4wc:6months.description: OHLC DIARIO ultimos ~6 meses (~130 dias habiles)
c2u4wc:6months.output_shape: Array de bars: igual que daily, mas datos

gXxkFd.description: Ratings tecnicos del simbolo (analogo a Recommend.* de TradingView)
gXxkFd.output_shape: [null, null, [[TKR, EX], unknown_flags..., bull_score, bear_score, neutral_score, rsi_value, ..., volume_score]]

Pr8h2e.description: Financials MASIVOS multi-period: income statement, balance sheet, cash flow. ~22-42KB de data
Pr8h2e.output_shape: Array anidado: [periods][financial_lines] con valores en raw currency units

kA4MVd:global.description: News globales del mercado (no especificas del simbolo)
kA4MVd:global.args_explanation: [2, 12, ...] — primer arg = tipo de feed (2 = global), segundo = limit (12)
kA4MVd:global.output_shape: Array de news items: [[url, title, source, thumbnail_url, timestamp, ...], ...]

kA4MVd:symbol.args_explanation: [5, 12, ...] — primer arg = tipo de feed (5 = symbol-specific), segundo = limit

RiQiSd.description: (DESCONOCIDO) RPC que retorna vacio con args vacios. Probable que requiera args especificos no descubiertos.
RiQiSd.status: UNKNOWN — devuelve [] con args vacios. Reverse-engineer mas si se necesita.
